mapper.select: SELECT UA.USER_ID , A.AUTHOR_ID , A.AUTHOR_CODE , A.AUTHOR_NM , ( CASE WHEN UA.USER_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS AUTHOR_MAP FROM SWC_AUTHOR A LEFT JOIN SWC_USER_AUTHOR UA ON UA.AUTHOR_ID = A.AUTHOR_ID AND UPPER(UA.USER_ID) = UPPER(#{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ORDER BY A.AUTHOR_CODE , A.AUTHOR_NM
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM SWC_USER_AUTHOR
AND UPPER(USER_ID) = UPPER(#{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND UPPER(AUTHOR_ID) = UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
DELETE FROM SWC_USER_AUTHOR WHERE USER_ID = UPPER(#{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND AUTHOR_ID IN (${authorityIds})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SWC_USER_AUTHOR (USER_ID, AUTHOR_ID, AUTHOR_VALUE, HIST_ID, REGIST_DT, REGIST_ID, UPDT_DT, UPDT_ID) VALUES (UPPER(#{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 1, NULL, NOW(), #{createId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), #{updateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AUTHOR_VALUE = 1, UPDT_DT = NOW(), UPDT_ID = #{updateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR};

INSERT INTO SWC_USER_AUTHOR (USER_ID, AUTHOR_ID, AUTHOR_VALUE, HIST_ID, REGIST_DT, REGIST_ID, UPDT_DT, UPDT_ID) VALUES (UPPER(#{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), UPPER(#{authorityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), NULL, NULL, NOW(), NULL, NOW(), NULL) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE UPDT_DT = NOW();
